competitive_landscape.rebuff_archived: May 2025 (Protect AI acquired by Palo Alto Networks)
competitive_landscape.nvidia_position: NeMo Guardrails focuses on dialog management, not pure injection

unsolved_problems.openclaw_delayed_injection: Confirmed unsolved. Clinejection incident Feb 2026. No existing tool detects persistent memory poisoning.
unsolved_problems.audit_standardization: Zero competitors have CIEU-like audit format. Proprietary logs everywhere.
unsolved_problems.cross_turn_assembly: Fragmented payloads across conversation turns not detected by point-in-time scanners.

strategic_frameworks.blue_ocean_differentiation: CIEU standard + OpenClaw memory attack coverage (uncontested space)
strategic_frameworks.jtbd_insight: Real job is compliance evidence, not just blocking

technical_insights.detection_strategy: Regex + heuristic (Iron Rule 1 compliant, no LLM)
technical_insights.performance_target: <10ms latency, 60-70% accuracy (lower than LLM but zero false positives)

action_items.mvp_scope: Pattern library + SOUL monitor + Claude Skill + MCP server
